overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a gold convertible driving at high speed through a desert highway environment. The vehicle travels along a multi-lane highway past billboards and Joshua trees before taking an exit onto a narrower desert road with abandoned satellite dishes and structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane desert highway with commercial billboards

events.description: passing a gas station complex on the right side of the highway
approaching highway exit ramp with overhead directional signage

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed in the right lane of a multi-lane highway, overtaking other vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan traveling in the left lane, moving same direction

entered.detail: large metal gantry with directional signs spanning across the highway
twin billboard structures forming an arch over the highway
metal highway guardrail running along the left side of the road
distinctive desert trees scattered along the roadside
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed drive along a multi-lane desert highway under clear blue skies. The gold convertible travels beneath large overhead sign gantries and billboard arches while passing other vehicles. Joshua trees and desert scrub line the roadside, with distant mountains visible on the horizon. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow view as the car approaches an exit ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp transitioning to desert road

events.description: vehicle takes the right exit ramp, decelerating and turning off the main highway
transitioning from multi-lane highway to narrower two-lane desert road

agents.ego_description: taking the exit ramp, braking and steering right onto the desert road

entered.detail: curved asphalt exit ramp leading off the main highway
distant derelict buildings and ruins visible in the desert

segments.scene_description: The vehicle decelerates and takes a right exit ramp off the main highway, transitioning from the wide multi-lane road to a narrower desert route. The camera follows the car through the turn, revealing abandoned structures in the distance. The overhead highway signs and billboards recede as the car commits to the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned desert road with satellite dishes

events.description: passing large abandoned satellite dishes on the left side of the road
encountering an oncoming vehicle on the narrow desert road

agents.ego_description: cruising along the desert road, passing abandoned structures and satellite installations

notable_agents.action: oncoming car approaching from the opposite direction on the narrow road

entered.detail: large parabolic satellite dish, clearly derelict and abandoned
narrow two-lane paved road cutting through desert terrain
derelict structure with rusted metal roof alongside the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the convertible along a narrow desert road flanked by Joshua trees and abandoned infrastructure. Large satellite dishes and derelict buildings appear on the left side, suggesting a former military or research installation. The road stretches toward distant mountains under the bright desert sun, with occasional oncoming traffic appearing on the narrow route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a gold convertible transitions from a high-speed multi-lane highway into a desolate, narrow desert road. It begins with the vehicle speeding under large overhead sign gantries and billboard arches, passing other cars and Joshua trees under a clear blue sky. As the car approaches an exit, the camera follows it decelerating and turning right, causing the wide highway and its commercial signage to recede into the distance. The scene then shifts to a more secluded environment where the road narrows and is flanked by derelict buildings and large satellite dishes. Finally, the camera tracks the car as it drives past this abandoned infrastructure toward distant mountains under the bright desert sun.
